title: Fertilization
summary: Fertilization occurs when a sperm successfully penetrates an egg, forming a single-celled zygote that contains the full genetic blueprint for human development.
key_developments: Genetic material from both parents combines

title: Implantation
summary: The zygote divides repeatedly and implants itself into the uterine wall, beginning a more stable phase of development.

title: Body Axis Formation
summary: The embryo begins forming its basic body plan, establishing the head-to-tail and front-to-back axes.

title: Early Organ Development
summary: Major organs begin to take shape as the embryo rapidly grows and folds into a more recognizable form.

title: Rapid Brain Growth
summary: The brain grows rapidly, and facial features begin to form as development accelerates.

title: Facial Formation
summary: Facial features become more distinct as the brain and sensory organs continue developing.

title: Limb Differentiation
summary: Arms and legs become more defined, with early joint formation beginning.

title: Organ Development
summary: Major internal organs become more functional as the body grows rapidly.
key_developments: Liver starts producing red blood cells

title: External Features Develop
summary: External features like eyebrows, eyelids, and ears begin to form.

title: Bone Formation
summary: Bones begin forming as cartilage hardens into bone, especially in the hands and feet.
key_developments: Fingers and toes form distinct ridges

title: Facial and Limb Refinement
summary: Facial and limb refinement continues as bone growth and muscle development increase.
key_developments: Fingers and toes separate more distinctly

title: Sensory Organs Mature
summary: The sensory organs mature, and the fetus can sense light and sound.

title: First Movements
summary: The fetus begins to move, although the movements are still very subtle.

title: Growth and Strength
summary: The fetus is growing rapidly and gaining strength in preparation for later stages.

title: Heart Development
summary: The heart is now fully functional, pumping blood through the fetus's circulatory system.

title: Refining the Nervous System
summary: The nervous system is maturing, and the fetus is starting to respond to stimuli.
key_developments: Fetus begins responding to external sounds

title: Fat and Weight Gain
summary: The fetus begins to gain fat and grow in weight rapidly.
key_developments: Fat begins to accumulate under skin
Lungs and digestive system are maturing

title: Lung Development
summary: The lungs continue to mature, and the fetus is able to practice breathing movements.

title: Bone Maturation
summary: The fetus's bones are hardening further and becoming stronger.

title: Developing Reflexes
summary: The fetus begins developing reflexes and is able to swallow and suck.
key_developments: Develops the ability to suck and swallow
Fetal movement is easier to feel
Fetal heartbeat can be detected externally

title: Growing Eyebrows and Hair
summary: Eyebrows and hair begin to form, and the skin becomes more opaque.
key_developments: Hair begins to grow on head

title: Hearing and Response to Sound
summary: The fetus is now able to hear external sounds and react to them.
key_developments: Fetal movements can be felt strongly

title: Breathing Movements
summary: The fetus practices breathing movements, although it doesn't yet breathe air.
key_developments: Fetus may begin responding to touch

title: Further Lung Maturation
summary: Lungs continue to mature, and the fetus begins to develop fat under the skin.

title: Growing and Developing Organ Systems
summary: The fetus's organs continue to grow and mature, and it gains more weight.
key_developments: Brain waves are strong and detectable

title: Rapid Growth Continues
summary: The fetus grows rapidly in size and its bones become even more developed.

title: Final Preparations
summary: The fetus finishes its final growth spurt and prepares for birth.

title: Full Term
summary: The fetus is fully developed and ready for birth.
key_developments: All organ systems are now functioning
The fetus continues to gain weight
The fetus is able to regulate body temperature

title: Final Growth Spurt
summary: The fetus experiences rapid growth and gains fat, with skin becoming smoother and less wrinkled.

title: Maturation of Organ Systems
summary: Organ systems continue to mature and prepare for life outside the womb.

title: Increased Movement
summary: The fetus becomes more active, moving frequently and practicing breathing motions.

title: Brain Development
summary: The brain continues to mature, with more distinct brain wave patterns and more organized functions.
key_developments: The fetus begins to store fat

title: Refinement of Systems
summary: All major organ systems are fully developed, and the fetus gains more weight.
key_developments: Lungs are close to full maturity
Fat is stored under the skin

title: Final Preparation for Birth
summary: The fetus is preparing for birth, with all organs functioning and systems finalizing their development.
key_developments: The fetus is gaining weight quickly

title: Fat Accumulation
summary: The fetus accumulates fat, and skin becomes less wrinkled.
key_developments: The body stores fat for energy
The fetus practices sucking and swallowing

title: Ready for Birth
summary: The fetus is ready for life outside the womb, with fully developed organs and systems.
key_developments: The fetus can regulate its body temperature
The digestive system is ready for feeding

title: Final Maturation
summary: The fetus's lungs and brain continue to mature as it prepares for birth.
key_developments: The fetus begins to practice breathing
The nervous system and brain become more active
Fat is fully stored under the skin

title: Labor Approaching
summary: The fetus is almost ready for labor, as it has fully developed systems and is nearly full-term.
key_developments: The head drops lower into the pelvis
The fetus is ready for birth

title: Full Term
summary: The fetus is now considered full-term and ready to be born.
key_developments: The lungs are ready to breathe air
The fetus is gaining weight rapidly

title: Birth
summary: The baby is born, ready for life outside the womb.
key_developments: The baby breathes air for the first time
Organs continue maturing outside the womb
The body begins its first stages of adaptation
